name: SoftJunk Sponsor Button Buy Route
purpose: A GitHub-native funding route that makes the repository Sponsor button point first to the exact 5 USD PayPal checkout while preserving the payment verification gate.
paypal_note_template: One Lead Rescue | Business: [business type] | Service: [service] | Source: [form/DM/call/email/referral] | Need: [missed call/estimate/no-show/quiet DM/price] | Tone: [friendly/professional/direct] | Next: [book/reply/quote/call]

route_steps.instruction: Use the repository Sponsor button or direct PayPal URL for the exact 5 USD checkout.
Use the safe one-lead rescue PayPal note with non-sensitive business context only.
Inspect the public post-verification delivery shell before or after payment.
Do not claim paid, started, delivered, or complete unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists.

privacy_rule: Use only non-sensitive business context in PayPal notes and public GitHub forms. Do not post customer names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, transaction IDs, patient data, or private lead details.
payment_verification_rule: This route is a payment path, not payment proof. Fulfillment starts only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
